answers.body:
Looks like the plugin org.ajoberstar.grgit requires credentials in order to access the repository. Since none are configured, it raises an error as such.

The documentation you can either use system properties to configure the credentials or an environment variable with an auth token.

Assuming environment variable, you will need to generate a token here and set that as GRGIT_USER environment variable.

title: Authentication is required but no CredentialsProvider has been registered - GITLAB
body:
I'm working on a pipeline on Gitlab. Every time I execute it, publish stage fails. On details I get the error below.

this project is inside a group variables are inherited. I have verified the credentials for my Gitlab account and I donÂ´t have issues to pull or push the project.

Important points:

  • code in .yml file is working with other projects inside the group, the only change on this specific script is a path for artifacts and the value of a variable used for a name.

  • we have tried using a different gitlab runner .

  • verified that all variables used in the project can be reached.

  • we have updated Gradle version and some plugins as well.

  • using --info or --debug we donÂ´t get any useful information.

has anyone had an issue like this one?

thanks in advance

``
